no: Might and Guile by subtledoctor. Warriors and rogues tweak/kit mod. All components optional. 18 new kits plus 9 tweak/revision components. CONFLICTS: Many components overlap with Artisan's Kitpack (AK), Rogue Rebalancing (RR), A7 Improved Archer, Shadowdancer Overhaul, and Talents of Faerun (ToF). Install order matters — M&G should install BEFORE AK and ToF so their overhauls take precedence. Active mod (v5.8, 329 commits).

conflicts.reason: BW's Blade/Jester/Skald overhauls and bard mechanics overlap with M&G's Bard Overhaul.
M&G #225 rewrites Archer CLAB (hard conflict with A7 overhaul). M&G #151 reclasses Archer to Fighter, breaking A7's ranger-based kit. Choose one Archer approach.
conflicts.myComps: #225 Revised Archers #151 Move Archer to Fighter
conflicts.source: Both strip SPCL121 Called Shot and rewrite clabrn02.2da. Other A7/M&G component combos are safe, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Proficiency and ability tweaks overlap with M&G's revised combat mechanics
conflicts.myComps: #225 Revised Archers #280 Revised Backstabbing #290 Revised THAC0

conflicts.reason: METweaks proficiency rate, movement speed, and fighting style components overlap with M&G's revised mechanics
conflicts.myComps: #201 Improved Rangers #210 Revised Movement #225 Revised Archers #290 Revised THAC0
conflicts.theirComps: #500 #505 #510 Proficiency rate #3400 #3405 #3410 #3415 Movement speed #4000 Fighting Styles

conflicts.reason: Both revise Beastmaster kit. F&P #33 (Install Druid kits) includes beast_lord as one of many druid kits — fits sphere system. M&G #235 (Revised Beastmaster) is a standalone ranger revision. M&G tp2 auto-skips #235 if F&P's beast_lord marker file exists. All other components of both mods are compatible.
conflicts.source: M&G tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE !(FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME d5__beastmaster.d5) on #235. Both mods by subtledoctor — mutual exclusion is intentional. Use F&P beast_lord if using sphere system, M&G #235 otherwise, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: M&G cn:280 (Revised Backstabs) rewrites Assassin/BH CLABs, conflicting with RR cn:1 (Kit Revisions) which does the same. M&G cn:400 (Revised Bards) overlaps with RR cn:4 (Bard Kit Revisions). M&G cn:280 and cn:400 No conflict.
conflicts.theirComps: #1 Thief Kit Revisions, #4 Bard Kit Revisions
conflicts.source: Both modify clabth02/03.2da and clabba01-04.2da with incompatible ability systems, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: HT proficiency, weapon style, and APR changes overlap with M&G revised mechanics
conflicts.myComps: #50 #55 #60 #65 Kit components #220 Revised Ranger Spell Table
conflicts.theirComps: #4 Rebalanced Proficiencies #5 Rebalanced Weapon Styles #7 Rebalanced APR

conflicts.reason: TnT grandmastery and multiclass restriction changes overlap with M&G's revised mechanics

No overlap for selected components. M&G only has cn:105 (Spellfilcher), cn:110 (Loremaster), cn:210 (Movement Bonuses) — all mage/thief kits with no ranger/fighter/proficiency modifications. The conflicting M&G components (cn:50-165 fighter/ranger/thief kits, cn:220 Ranger Spell Table, cn:280 Backstabs, cn:400 Bards) are ToF ranger/proficiency/style components modify different class files. If selecting M&G fighter/ranger kits alongside ToF, check per-component: M&G kits use ADD_KIT which writes kit-specific WEAPPROF columns, while ToF cn:81100 externalizes WEAPPROF to Lua.
conflicts.theirComps: #40400 Ranger spells #40500 Favored enemy #41000 Rebalanced kits #81100 Proficiency #81200 Styles
conflicts.myComps: #105 Spellfilcher (safe) #110 Loremaster (safe) #210 Movement (safe) — ranger/fighter kits NOT in preset
conflicts.source: M&G selected components are mage/thief kits with no ranger/fighter/prof file overlap; conflict only applies to unselected M&G fighter/ranger components, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: MO replaces fist system with custom QDMFIST item. M&G modifies vanilla fist tables which MO monks never use.

new: Dashing fighter-rogue hybrid. Part warrior, part charming sailor with roguish combat tricks.
Fighter drawing on implacable fighting spirit. Monk-like focus with full fighter training.
Master weapon and armor forger. Crafting abilities and enhanced equipment maintenance.
Combines barbarian rage and toughness with thief stealth and skills.
Adventurer specializing in dungeon exploration. Trap expertise and ancient lore.
Rogue who applies violence effectively. Enhanced combat abilities for a thief.
Roguish charmer combining thief skills with swashbuckling flair.
Eastern assassin with stealth mastery. Poison, disguise, and silent killing techniques.
Eastern assassin with stealth mastery. Poison, disguise, and silent killing techniques.
Mage/Thief who steals magical protections and spell effects from enemies.
Scholar combining arcane and roguish knowledge. Enhanced identification and lore.
Ranger specializing in temperate woodland environments. Enhanced forest tracking and stealth.
Ranger specializing in highland terrain. Cold resistance and climbing abilities.
Ranger specializing in tropical environments. Poison resistance and jungle stealth.
Ranger specializing in arid wastelands. Heat resistance and sand navigation.
Ranger specializing in frozen tundra. Cold immunity and snow tracking.
Ranger specializing in tracking and countering arcane spellcasters. Spell disruption.
Combines barbarian fury with ranger wilderness skills and dual-wielding.
Elven ranger variant with superior archery. Enhanced ranged combat abilities.
Halfling specialist in sling combat. Enhanced ranged damage with slings.
Thief variant focused on ranged combat. Sniper-like precision with ranged weapons.

modify: Revised Called Shot abilities and archery mechanics
Revised Stalker weapon proficiencies and abilities
Revised Beastmaster weapon compatibility (daggers, axes, spears)
Revised monk fist items and abilities
Revised monk fist items and abilities

new: Acrobatic bard combining juggling, tumbling, and performance with light combat.
Scholar combining arcane and roguish knowledge. Enhanced identification and lore.
Courtly bard skilled in diplomacy and noble combat. Charm and inspire abilities.
Master vocalist whose songs carry enhanced magical power and duration.
Scholarly bard preserving ancient knowledge through song. Enhanced lore abilities.

sum: Fighter, ranger, and thief overhaul with 35 components: revised proficiencies, new kits, and rebalanced combat abilities for martial classes.

co.n: Move the Cavalier to the Fighter Class
co.no: Moves Cavalier from Paladin to Fighter class. Conflicts with ToF class revisions. Conflicts with AK Cavalier Overhaul (cn:3010). Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Move the Cavalier to the Fighter Class

co.no: Corsair — swashbuckling fighter with nautical flair. ToF treats as pure fighter. Adds 1 kit slot.
Sohei Warrior — Japanese-inspired fighter with ki abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
Ironsmith — smithing/crafting focused fighter. Adds 1 kit slot.
Assigns Ironsmith kit to Breagar NPC. Requires cn:65 AND Breagar mod installed.
Barbarian/Thief multiclass kit. Fighter/Thief base class with barbarian abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
Tomb Runner multiclass kit. Fighter/Thief dungeon specialist with trap/undead abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
Thug multiclass kit. Fighter/Thief bruiser with intimidation. Adds 1 kit slot.

co.n: Add the Rake (thief kit) and revise the Swashbuckler
co.no: Rake (thief kit) + revises Swashbuckler. Swashbuckler revision conflicts with AK Swashbuckler Overhaul and Shadowdancer Overhaul's thief THAC0 changes. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Add the Rake (thief kit) and revise the Swashbuckler

co.no: Ninja as thief kit. Incompatible with other Swashbuckler revisions (also rewrites Swashbuckler CLAB). Adds 1 kit slot.
Ninja as fighter/thief kit. Independent of cn:96. Adds 1 kit slot.
Spellfilcher multiclass kit. Mage/Thief with spell-stealing abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
Loremaster multiclass kit. Mage/Thief scholar with lore bonuses and divination. Adds 1 kit slot.
Regional Ranger kits — Forest, Mountain, Jungle, Desert, Arctic. 5 terrain-themed ranger variants. Adds 5 kit slots total.
Mage Hunter — ranger specialized in anti-magic combat. Incompatible with other ranger revisions (AK Ranger Overhaul, ToF ranger changes). Adds 1 kit slot.
Barbarian Ranger — wild ranger with barbarian abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
DEPRECATED by mod author. Fake multiclass rangers using kit slots. Do not use. Author says 'these are bad'. Adds kit slots wastefully.

co.n: Move the Archer to the Fighter Class
co.no: Moves Archer from Ranger to Fighter class. BREAKS A7 Improved Archer mod which expects Archer as Ranger kit. Conflicts with AK Archer Overhaul. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Move the Archer to the Fighter Class

co.no: Elven Archer — elf-only ranged ranger. Redundant with A7 Improved Archer (which also adds fighter/ranger/thief archer kits). Adds 1 kit slot.
Halfling Slinger multiclass kit. Fighter/Thief halfling ranged specialist. Adds 1 kit slot.
Marksman — ranged-focused thief kit. Similar to A7 Sharpshooter and Shadowdancer Overhaul's Thief THAC0. Adds 1 kit slot.
Improved Rangers — gives rangers better innate abilities. Redundant with A7 Improved Archer's ranger changes and AK Ranger Overhaul. May overlap with ToF ranger revisions.
Quickstride — revised movement speed bonuses for rangers/monks. Incompatible with other ranger revisions that also modify movement (AK, ToF). Standalone tweak.
Revised Ranger Spell Table — changes spell progression. Conflicts with IWDification cn:170 (Ranger Spell Progression) and ToF ranger spells.
Revised Archers — enhanced called shot abilities. Conflicts with A7 Improved Archer cn:0 (which also revises Archer). AK Archer Overhaul also touches this.
Revised Stalkers — improved Stalker kit abilities. Conflicts with AK Stalker Overhaul (cn:2011). Both rewrite Stalker CLAB.
Revised Beastmaster — improved Beastmaster kit. Conflicts with AK Beast Master Overhaul (cn:2012). Both rewrite Beastmaster CLAB.
Revised Monk Fists — rebalances monk unarmed damage progression. May conflict with ToF monk revisions.
Revised Backstabbing — changes backstab mechanics globally. Incompatible with AK Stalker/Assassin overhauls and Shadowdancer Overhaul. Affects ALL thief classes.
Revised Rogue THAC0 — improves thief/bard THAC0 progression. Similar to Shadowdancer Overhaul cn:300. Both modify global thief THAC0 tables. Choose one approach.

Bard Overhaul: Multiclass Bards — major bard class revision using qd_multiclass. Rewrites bard CLABs globally. CONFLICTS with RR Bard HLAs (cn:5), IWDification Bard Songs (cn:50), and any mod that modifies bard progression. Significant kit slot usage.
Jongleur — acrobatic bard kit. Incompatible with Bardic Wonders mod. Adds 1 kit slot.
Loremaster — knowledge-focused bard kit. Different from mage/thief Loremaster (cn:110). Adds 1 kit slot.
Gallant — chivalric bard kit. Adds 1 kit slot.
Meistersinger — nature-themed bard kit. Adds 1 kit slot.
Loresinger — lore/history bard kit. Adds 1 kit slot.

advisories.reason: cdtweaks #2160 (Rebalanced weapon proficiencies) restructures weapprof.2da columns. M&G kit components write proficiency values using column indices that may be wrong after restructuring. Install cdtweaks before M&G. Old M&G #500 (Multiclass Kits) was removed in v5.8.9.
advisories.theirComps: #2160 Rebalanced weapon proficiencies; #2060 Weapon Styles for All; #2400 #2401 Ranger Spell Progression; #2240 Un-Nerfed THAC0 Table #2440 Bonus APR
advisories.source: M&G v5.8.9 tp2 hardcodes weapprof column indices. cdtweaks 2160 changes column layout. Install order: cdtweaks first, 2026-03

advisories.reason: IWD bard songs may conflict with M&G's Bard Overhaul.
